features.name: Bonus Feat
features.summary: Gain a monk bonus feat from the 1st-level list.

features.name: Flurry of Blows
features.summary: Make an additional unarmed strike or monk-weapon attack as part of a full attack.

features.name: Stunning Fist
features.summary: Gain Stunning Fist as a bonus feat.

features.name: Unarmed Strike
features.summary: Unarmed strikes deal lethal damage and count as manufactured and natural weapons.

features.name: Bonus Feat
features.summary: Gain a monk bonus feat from the 1st-level list.

features.name: Evasion
features.summary: Take no damage on a successful Reflex save against qualifying effects.

features.name: Fast Movement +10 ft.
features.summary: Gain an enhancement bonus to land speed while unarmored and unencumbered.

features.name: Maneuver Training
features.summary: Use monk level in place of monk base attack bonus when calculating CMB.

features.name: Still Mind
features.summary: Gain a +2 bonus on saves against enchantment spells and effects.

features.name: AC Bonus +1
features.summary: Add Wisdom bonus and a scaling bonus to AC and CMD while unarmored and unencumbered.
features.scaling: +1 at level 4 and every 4 levels thereafter

features.name: Ki Pool (Magic)
features.summary: Gain ki points and treat unarmed strikes as magic for overcoming damage reduction.

features.name: Slow Fall 20 ft.
features.summary: Reduce effective falling distance while adjacent to a wall.

features.name: High Jump
features.summary: Add monk level to Acrobatics checks to jump and always count as having a running start.

features.name: Purity of Body
features.summary: Gain immunity to all diseases.

features.name: Bonus Feat
features.summary: Gain a monk bonus feat; the expanded 6th-level list is available.

features.name: Ki Pool (Cold Iron/Silver)
features.summary: Unarmed strikes count as cold iron and silver for overcoming damage reduction.

features.name: Wholeness of Body
features.summary: Spend ki to heal your own wounds.
features.scaling: Heal monk level hit points for 2 ki points

features.name: Improved Evasion
features.summary: Take only half damage on a failed qualifying Reflex save.

features.name: Bonus Feat
features.summary: Gain a monk bonus feat; the expanded 10th-level list is available.

features.name: Ki Pool (Lawful)
features.summary: Unarmed strikes count as lawful for overcoming damage reduction.

features.name: Diamond Body
features.summary: Gain immunity to poisons.

features.name: Abundant Step
features.summary: Spend ki to move as dimension door.

features.name: Diamond Soul
features.summary: Gain spell resistance.

features.name: Bonus Feat
features.summary: Gain a monk bonus feat.

features.name: Quivering Palm
features.summary: Once each day, set up a potentially fatal vibration with an unarmed strike.
features.scaling: Fortitude DC 10 + 1/2 monk level + Wisdom modifier

features.name: Ki Pool (Adamantine)
features.summary: Unarmed strikes count as adamantine for overcoming damage reduction and hardness.

features.name: Timeless Body
features.summary: No longer take ability penalties for aging and cannot be magically aged.

features.name: Tongue of the Sun and Moon
features.summary: Speak with any living creature.

features.name: Bonus Feat
features.summary: Gain a monk bonus feat.

features.name: Empty Body
features.summary: Spend ki to become ethereal for 1 minute.

features.name: Perfect Self
features.summary: Become an outsider and gain damage reduction 10/chaotic.
